creator: ariff@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You're using "unofficial" driver for RELENG_6 which is by 
no way supported nor considered as a valid issue for 
RELENG_6. 

Please consider joining irc: #freebsd-azalia @ irc.freenode.net 
for a serious debugging / discussion. We're currently lacking of 
manpower, hardware availabilty, etc. so don't expect this issue 
can be solved overnight. The driver itself still in its infancy 
and require major rethinking before it can be merged into RELENG_6. 

I'm closing this PR. Thanks anyway.
